description: Status totals are derived from the current route registry after the canonical publication-boundary overlay is applied. Historical labels remain visible in the boundary registry rather than being erased.
limitations: The browser page validates effective same-origin metadata; it cannot certify editorial scholarship.
Historical route labels are retained in the boundary registry for audit traceability.
Network or cache failures may temporarily prevent reconciliation and page-evidence checks.
GitHub Actions status is not inferred from this static dashboard.
